title: Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance * Social Security Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Foster Families > Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance * Social Security Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES GENERAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers short-term financial assistance for individuals applying for Social Security benefits. Support is also available with applications and appeals. Participants are required to repay part of the award received. This is not an emergency service, and applications may take 3–6 months to process. 500 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Must meet all of the following criteria: -Ages 18-64 with no minor children in the household -Homeless or at imminent risk of homelessness -Have a condition that meets Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) or Supplemental Security Income (SSI) qualifying criteria -Are not currently receiving SSDI or SSI -Have already applied or plan to apply for SSDI or SSI and if the latter are filing an appeal if the awards have been denied -Be receiving Presumptive Medicaid assistance Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (866) 535-8431 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES GENERAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM
